headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight Rating on Cencora (COR)
summary: Cencora, Inc. (NYSE:COR) is one of the 10 Best Depressed Stocks to Buy in 2026. On May 11, 2026, Wells Fargo analyst Stephen Baxter lowered the firm’s price target on Cencora, Inc. (NYSE:COR) to $331 from $429 while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said the magnitude of the slowdown in U.S. […]
